focus: Fallback-router wiring decision and fanout retry seam
noveltyJustification: Confirmed the zero-caller gap and identified a safer integration seam than putting model policy inside the generic pool primitive.
keyFindings: fallback-router.ts already supports typed failure routing and separate-pool fallback decisions.
fanout-pool.cjs currently only schedules same-item retries until maxRetries, then fails the item.
If phase 004 runs, fanout-run should own the model registry and pass fallback behavior into the pool rather than hardcoding model policy in the generic pool.
